content.fact_text: Implementation of the ReconciliationOrchestrator for managing inventory consistency between PostgreSQL and Kafka-based event streams.

provenance_data.behaviour: Orchestrates an inventory reconciliation process using distributed locks, ACID-compliant database transactions, and circuit-breaker protected I/O. Emits reconciliation events and handles critical discrepancies.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a mission-critical reconciliation service component to ensure eventual consistency in ecommerce inventory management, using distributed locking for concurrency control and ACID-compliant transactions for data integrity.
